feature: MillenniumIT P3b — Market Data + Service Desk + Bulk Upload + Deletion
requirement: Market data endpoints, service desk operations, bulk instrument upload, instrument deletion lifecycle

tasks.title: Market data + service desk + bulk upload + deletion handlers
tasks.description:
Add all P3b features to securities-service in one task.

APPEND to types.go:
- OrderBookSnapshot struct: InstrumentID, Bids []PriceLevel, Asks []PriceLevel, Timestamp — json tags
- PriceLevel struct: Price float64, Quantity int, OrderCount int — json tags
- TickerData struct: InstrumentID, LastPrice float64, BidPrice float64, AskPrice float64, Volume int, DayHigh float64, DayLow float64, DayOpen float64, Timestamp — json tags
- BulkUploadResult struct: Total int, Created int, Failed int, Errors []BulkError — json tags
- BulkError struct: Index int, Ticker string, Error string — json tags
- DeletionStatus constants: DELETION_FLAGGED, DELETION_SCHEDULED, DELETION_COMPLETED
- Add DeletionDate string and DeletionStatus string fields to Instrument struct

Create handlers:

1. handlers_market_data.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/market-data/book/{instrument_id} — build order book from PENDING orders (group by price, count orders)
- GET /api/v1/securities/market-data/ticker/{instrument_id} — last trade price, best bid/ask from resting orders, daily volume
- GET /api/v1/securities/market-data/trades/{instrument_id} — recent trades from tradeStore

2. handlers_service_desk.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/service-desk/orders — submit order on behalf (validate: participant_id in body, submitter has PERM_ADMIN_MANAGE)
- POST /api/v1/securities/service-desk/cancel-order — cancel on behalf {order_id, reason}

3. handlers_bulk.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/bulk/instruments — accept JSON array of instruments, validate each, create all valid ones, return BulkUploadResult with per-item errors

4. Add to handlers_instrument.go (or instrument dispatcher):
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id} — flag for deletion (set DeletionStatus=FLAGGED, DeletionDate=now+30d), don't actually remove
- Instrument with FLAGGED status: reject new orders, exclude from market data

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for P3b features
tasks.description:
Write tests for market data, service desk, bulk upload, and deletion.

Tests:

1. handlers_market_data_test.go:
- TestOrderBookSnapshot — create buy+sell orders, GET book → bids and asks populated
- TestTicker — create trades, GET ticker → last price, volume
- TestRecentTrades — GET trades → list of recent trades
- TestOrderBookEmpty — no orders → empty bids/asks

2. handlers_service_desk_test.go:
- TestServiceDeskSubmitOrder — submit on behalf → 201
- TestServiceDeskCancelOrder — cancel on behalf → 200

3. handlers_bulk_test.go:
- TestBulkUpload_AllValid — 3 instruments → 3 created, 0 failed
- TestBulkUpload_PartialFail — 3 instruments, 1 invalid → 2 created, 1 failed with error
- TestBulkUpload_EmptyArray → 400

4. Deletion tests (add to existing):
- TestDeleteInstrument_FlagForDeletion — DELETE → status FLAGGED, deletion_date set
- TestDeleteInstrument_RejectOrders — flagged instrument rejects new orders

Target: 70%+.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
